title: brachyglottis × matthewsii
intro: Brachyglottis × matthewsii, also known as the New Zealand bronze fern or Matthews' brachyglottis, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, making it a natural remedy for issues such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and stomach ulcers. The health benefits of Brachyglottis × matthewsii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Brachyglottis × matthewsii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and promote overall well-being.
